item.title: Samoyed Meet-Up
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Samoyed Meet-Up This is a meet-up for Samoyeds! Got a cute, fluffy cloud for a dog? Come meet all of the other Seattle Samoyeds! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! Event image: https://static.wixstatic.com/media/037af7_4f085a3e4e4048588e19ce7399bb609b~mv2.jpg More information: https://www.dogwoodplaypark.com/event-details/samoyed-meet-up-7

From Dogwood Play Park Events

item.description:
Saturday, May 9, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Small Dog Meet Up All dogs 19lbs and under are welcome! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! item.title: Dog Mom's Day!
item.description:
Sunday, May 10, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Dog Mom's Day! Come celebrate with us! Mimosa bar with fruit toppers, $1 off mimosas for dog moms, DIY photo booth, hidden gold = treats for your dog. Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! Event image: https://static.wixstatic.com/media/037af7_c7da4d697a7a44dfa6ffff0e66573e8f~mv2.png More information: https://www.dogwoodplaypark.com/event-details/dog-moms-day

From Dogwood Play Park Events

Event details

item.title: Golden Retriever Meet Up
item.description:
Saturday, May 16, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Golden Retriever Meet Up This is a breed specific meet up for GOLDENS! Join us for a fun morning of play time! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! Sunday, May 24, 2026 at 1 PM

item.title: Short Snout Meet Up (Frenchie, Boston, Pug)
item.description:
Saturday, May 30, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Short Snout Meet Up (Frenchie, Boston, Pug) Bring your Frenchie, Bulldog, Pug or Boston and come join the short snorty fun! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! item.title: Fi Collar FOAM PARTY! Save the date!
item.description:
Saturday, July 25, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Fi Collar FOAM PARTY! Save the date! Details to come for our 2nd annual Fi Collar sponsored FOAM party! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar!
